hero.tagline: I build fast, accessible, and production-ready web applications with React and TypeScript.

about.title: About Me
about.bio: Frontend Developer with 4+ years of experience building and shipping production web applications. Deep expertise in the React and TypeScript ecosystem — scalable component architecture, real-time interfaces, API integrations, and performance-focused development.

contact.cta_subtitle: Have a project in mind or just want to talk? I'm always open to new opportunities.
